DebugWarning: Please note you have debug mode turned on. It isn't recommended to leave this on unless you have a purpose for it.
Conflict.MoveObjects.Note: Turn on 'I Build Where I Want Compatibility' in Move Objects' settings.
cfg.debug_logging.name: Debug Logging
cfg.debug_logging.desc: Write verbose build-menu diagnostics to the BepInEx console. Leave off for normal play.
cfg.building_collision.name: Building Collision
cfg.building_collision.desc: Enforce collision between buildings. Turn off to let placed structures overlap.
cfg.grid.name: Grid
cfg.grid.desc: Show the build-mode grid overlay while placing structures.
cfg.grey_overlay.name: Grey Overlay
cfg.grey_overlay.desc: Show the grey removal-mode overlay when tearing structures down.
cfg.menu_key_bind.name: Menu Key Bind
cfg.menu_key_bind.desc: Keybind for opening the build-anywhere crafts menu.
cfg.menu_controller_button.name: Menu Controller Button
cfg.menu_controller_button.desc: Gamepad button for opening the build-anywhere crafts menu.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
